---
name: 💡 Feature Request / Animation Idea
about: Suggest a new GSAP animation or layout pattern for the playground
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Feature Proposal

A clear and concise description of the animation concept, interactive mechanics, or layouts you are proposing.

## GSAP Techniques Involved

What specific GSAP features/plugins would this use? (e.g. `ScrollTrigger` scrubbing, `Observer` for wheel intercepts, `CustomEase` for elastic bounces, etc.)

## Visual Mockups or References

If possible, link to design references, video recordings, website inspirations, or codepens demonstrating similar movement.

## Proposed Layout Structure

How would this look in a modular, single-file setup? E.g. what kind of layout elements would it contain?
